description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a gable roof, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring several trees and shrubs. The house has a light-colored exterior, likely painted in white or a pale shade, and features multiple symmetrically arranged windows on both floors. The front of the house includes a small porch area with steps leading up to the main entryway, which is accentuated by a curved awning and flanked by decorative plants. The property includes a driveway leading to a large, dark-colored garage or carport structure adjacent to the house. The backyard appears to have a patio or paved area, possibly for outdoor seating or recreation, and is enclosed by low fencing. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and a welcoming entry.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, landscaped yard, and a prominent driveway with a large garage or carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a curved awning, porch steps, and decorative landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large garage/carport, driveway, and additional yard space with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio area, fencing, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage/carport, side yard, and more trees along the property boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, a curved awning, small porch, and decorative landscaping.
